name: Oat/Carrot Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to the temperature specified in your bread recipe.
2. Grease a loaf pan according to your preferred method (e.g., with butter, cooking spray, or oil).
3. Mix all the dry ingredients (flours, gluten, salt, sugar, nonfat dry milk) in a large bowl until well combined.
4. Add the wet ingredients (water, applesauce, shredded carrots, cinnamon, sunflower seeds) and mix until just incorporated.
5. Stir in the yeast and mix until fully combined.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan.
7. Place the pan in the preheated oven.
8. Bake according to your recipe's instructions.
9. Turn off the oven when the bread is done baking.
10. Allow the bread to cool in the pan for a few minutes before removing it and slicing.
